title: Cost-control operating policy
description: Add explicit local/CI/EC2 runtime split and no-loop rules.
notes: Prevents EC2 starts for work that can be prepared locally or in CI.

title: Local dev preflight helper
description: Check GPU memory local ComfyUI candidates model roots and selected-lane static validity without external contact.
notes: Local dev does not replace EC2 final proof; current local ComfyUI main.py is absent.

title: Deploy bundle helper
description: Package lane files run package registry metadata and safe runtime context while EC2 is off.
notes: Bundle output is gitignored under runtime_artifacts/deploy_bundles.

title: GitHub Actions preflight package
description: Run model registry coverage package build and deploy bundle upload on GitHub-hosted Windows runner.
notes: Uses checkout with lfs=false and artifact retention 7 days.

title: Skip LFS by default on EC2
description: Make Git LFS pull opt-in for EC2 helpers.
notes: Use -SkipGitLfsPull unless a lane explicitly needs repo LFS payloads.

title: Runtime TTL guardrails
description: Add max runtime minutes and SSM command timeout/cancel handling to EC2 helpers.
notes: Live proof still must stop EC2 and verify final state.

title: Queue current-lane transition
description: Move from completed low-risk proof lane to current RealVisXL runtime lane without hardcoding order-one gating.
notes: Prevents autonomous loops that keep trying to re-run the completed low-risk lane.

title: S3 deploy bundle publishing
description: Add optional GitHub Actions S3 upload plus local S3 publish helper for prepared deploy bundles.
notes: EC2 helpers should prefer verified S3 bundle zip over git pull when available.

title: EC2 deploy bundle S3 consumption
description: Add -DeployBundleS3Uri and -DeployBundleSha256 to static proof and smoke helpers.
notes: Reduces EC2-on sync time and keeps Git LFS off the GPU clock.

title: RealVisXL S3 model installer
description: Install the missing checkpoint from S3 into EC2 ComfyUI and verify SHA256 in one bounded window.
notes: Do not use Git or Git LFS for model binaries.

title: Emergency stop safety net
description: Add EventBridge Scheduler emergency stop and instance-side watchdog helpers.
notes: Protects against hung runtime windows leaving EC2 running.

title: AWS least privilege templates
description: Add S3 GitHub OIDC EC2 runtime and scheduler stop role policy templates.
notes: Templates are valid placeholders; apply real bucket prefix and role values before live transfer.

title: Local ComfyUI dev start helper
description: Add low-VRAM local ComfyUI startup helper for prompt and workflow iteration.
notes: Local dev reduces EC2 starts but never replaces final EC2 proof.

title: RealVisXL pullback and image QA
description: Pull back the completed RealVisXL smoke artifact and record technical plus visual QA.
notes: SSM-backed SCP was used because S3 pullback is not configured yet.

title: S3 runtime transfer readiness helper
description: Add local-only readiness helper that validates S3 IAM policy templates and redacted bucket role config before future EC2 transfer windows.
notes: S3 deploy bundle URI model bucket render output prefix GitHub OIDC role and scheduler stop role must be configured before live S3 publish or EC2 transfer use.

title: Queued-lane registry coverage hardening
description: Make model registry coverage derive active lanes from runtime_lane_queue.json instead of hardcoding the first two SDXL lanes.
notes: Future lane/module work must update runtime requirements model registry and runtime-validation queue rows before EC2 readiness can pass.

title: Generic required-model type support
description: Allow queued-lane registry coverage to validate model_type from required_models instead of forcing every required asset to be a Checkpoint.
notes: Future non-SDXL lanes can register UNet CLIP VAE LoRA or other model assets with explicit model_type before runtime proof.

title: Generic static required-model reference checks
description: Require non-checkpoint required_models to declare node_id/input or node_class/input so static workflow validation can prove model assets are actually referenced.
notes: Current SDXL lanes pass through the checkpoint fallback and future non-SDXL lanes must provide explicit model node mappings.
